# hcloudimage Provider

Uploads a raw disk image into a Hetzner Cloud project and turns it into a reusable snapshot, using the rescue-server upload trick.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    hcloudimage = {
      source  = "nivis-project/hcloudimage"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

# Reads HCLOUD_TOKEN from the environment when token is unset.
provider "hcloudimage" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) Override the hcloud API endpoint (for testing or a mock). Defaults to the SDK default.
- `poll_interval` (String) Optional passthrough for action polling, expressed as a Go duration string (e.g. `500ms`, `2s`).
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Hetzner Cloud API token. Falls back to the `HCLOUD_TOKEN` environment variable when unset.
